creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #10)
> Just to make sure: does it only fix the assert, or does it also make c++filt to decode the symbol correctly?

So far I've only been fixing assertions, which there are quite a few of. But unfortunately libelftc's demangler does not seem to implement any of the machinery to handle C++11 features, like unnamed types, lambda's etc. Adding these does not look trivial.
